title: ophrys araneola subsp. ausonia
intro: Ophrys araneola subsp. ausonia, also known as the Ausonian Spider Orchid, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Ophrys araneola orchid, typically found in the Calabria region of Italy. The Ausonian Spider Orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving pain, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. The Ausonian Spider Orchid can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, although its use and availability may be limited due to its rarity.
